topics: Quantitative estimation of sugars: Estimation of reducing sugars by Nelson Somogyi method, Benedict's method, and DNS method; Estimation of fructose by the Resorcinol method
Quantitative estimation of amino acids and proteins: Estimation of protein by Biuret method and Folin's method; Estimation of amino acid by Ninhydrin method; Estimation of Tyrosine by Folin's method
Quantitative estimation of nucleic acids: Estimation of DNA by Diphenylamine reagent method; Estimation of RNA by Orcinol reagent method
Quantitative estimation of cholesterol by Zak's method
Estimation of Thiamine and Riboflavin by Fluorimetry
Precipitation of proteins by ammonium sulphate
Paper chromatography - Separation of amino acids by paper chromatography and determination of Rf value
Thin Layer chromatography - Extraction of lipids and separation using thin layer chromatography
Column chromatography - Determination of molecular weight of macromolecules
